impact: This advances the PP&D DevHub workflow model with deterministic, commit-safe evidence for fee review, visible balance handling, payment instructions, read-only review status, and required financial stop points without storing private session artifacts or enabling payment automation.
summary: Add a redacted mocked DevHub permit-fee review and payment-readiness fixture with focused validation.
target_task: Task checkbox-82: Add a mocked DevHub workflow snapshot fixture for permit fee review and payment-readiness that records visible balances, payment instructions, safe read-only status, and financial-action stop points using only redacted values.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
